title: Do You Want to Make Real Estate Income but Don't Have a Lot of Money? Here's How to Start for Under $100.
text: Equity Residential is a leading apartment landlord that pays an attractive dividend. Realty Income has an exceptional track record of increasing its monthly dividend.

title: Here's Why Equity Residential (EQR) is an Apt Portfolio Pick
text: Equity Residential (EQR) is expected to benefit from its portfolio diversification. It has a healthy balance sheet and is banking on technology, scale and organizational capabilities to drive growth.

title: Financial Market Outlook: August 2023
text: The global economic environment is in the midst of a structural shift as most regional economic cycles are within their troughs. This leads to adjustments in the outlook for factors such as inflation, risk premiums and general asset valuations.

title: 3 REIT Stocks For Your August 2023 Watchlist
text: 3 REIT stocks to watch this month.

title: Equity Residential: Less Exposed To New Supply, Shares Fairly Valued
text: Equity Residential's exposure to urban markets could have once been seen as a liability. It now appears to be an asset. Increased return-to-work mandates and improving standards surrounding quality of life are driving residents back to the cities they had once left. While rising deliveries of multifamily units poses risks to certain markets, particularly in the Sunbelt states, the urban centers appear more insulated from this threat.

title: Equity Residential: Positioned For A Double Total Return
text: Equity Residential is a residential REIT with a focus on legacy markets on both coasts, which have lower valuations and more favorable supply-demand dynamics. EQR has a strong tenant base with high-income households, which allows for aggressive rent increases during good times and steadier cash flows during bad times. EQR's latest results show positive growth in same-store NOI.
